pi_items.source: Odoo official demo data (confirmed in /workspace/scripts/setup_data.py lines 7-10, which lists 20 employees including Anita Oliver)

Web search for real banks named 'Safe Bank' returned no results. This appears to be a fictional/synthetic bank name created for the task. Task setup script (setup_task.sh line 63) explicitly deletes 'Safe Bank' records before each task run.

The account number format is valid (10 digits, within the US standard of 8-12 digits per Chase/Stripe documentation). However, the task setup script (setup_task.sh line 57) explicitly cleans account numbers matching this value before each run, indicating it is synthetic test data. The sequential digit pattern (9876543210) suggests a demo value.

privileged_info_summary: The task targets employee Anita Oliver, who is confirmed to be part of Odoo's official demo data (20 standard employees). The banking details (Safe Bank and account number 9876543210) are synthetic demonstration values created specifically for this task. The task setup explicitly clears these values before each execution to ensure a clean testing state.
